caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary. The screen is split into two sections: on the left, there is an image of Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating via phone. On the right, a man in a suit and tie is speaking into a microphone, gesturing with his hands as he addresses an audience. The headline at the bottom reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," suggesting that the discussion revolves around Bola Tinubu's political stance or campaign. The segment is part of a program called "PLUS POLITICS" and can be watched on DStv channel 408 and StarTimes channel 308. The setting indicates a live broadcast with a focus on current political events in Nigeria.
